name: John Barrasso
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $1,891,392 for John Barrasso in U.S. Senate, WY. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.

timeline.event: Track AIPAC congressional listing records Israel Lobby Total: $1,891,392.
